title: CLI: /group create, /group list, /group leave commands
description:
What: Add three slash commands to the CLI chat loop.

/group create <name>:
1. Parse name from rest of line; reject empty
2. Build GroupCreateParams { name }
3. Send JsonRpcRequest(GROUP_CREATE) via tx
4. Response: add to active_groups; print confirmation

/group list:
1. Send JsonRpcRequest(GROUP_LIST, {})
2. Response: print table; update active_groups map

/group leave <name>:
1. Resolve name to group_id from active_groups keys/names
2. Send JsonRpcRequest(GROUP_LEAVE, GroupLeaveParams { group_id })
3. On OkResult: remove from active_groups; print confirmation

Also add /group to /help text.

Defensive rules:
- Resolve group by name case-insensitively
- If name not found in active_groups: print error message, do not crash
- Empty name → print usage message, do not send

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie passes; /group with no args prints usage; /group leave <unknown> prints error without crashing
